---
name: Subsystem Change
about: Propose a bounded change to one subsystem or child subsystem
title: "[subsystem] "
labels: ["subsystem", "change"]
---

## Target subsystem

Name the subsystem ID exactly.

## Intended change

Describe the bounded change.

## Dependency impact

List allowed dependencies affected.

## Validation impact

State what validator, tests, or exports must change.

## Non-changes

State what should remain untouched.
